summary: K9 API Refactoring Testing Complete - All 9 domain-specific routers verified working. Refactoring from /api/moego to /api/k9 successful.
action_items: Consider removing or updating legacy test files that still reference /api/moego (test_moego_phase2*.py, test_connecteam_phase1.py)
critical_code_review_comments: Legacy test files in /app/backend/tests/ still reference old /api/moego endpoints - these will fail if run
Comment in server.py mentions 'refactored from moego.py' - acceptable documentation
context_for_next_testing_agent: K9 API refactoring complete. All 9 routers (kennels, bookings, operations, notifications, payments, portal, inventory, crm, reminders) working correctly. Old /api/moego endpoints return 404 as expected. Frontend pages (Inventory, POS, CRM, Customer Portal) all load correctly with new /api/k9 endpoints.
tested_frontend_pages: Inventory Management (/admin/inventory) - Products table, Add Product button working
POS Checkout (/admin/pos) - Cart, Charge button working (no products shown due to active_only filter)
CRM Leads (/admin/crm) - Lead pipeline with 6 leads, retention metrics visible
Customer Portal (/customer/portal) - All 5 tabs working, Reminders preferences toggles functional
